race.comment: MY TRUTH (13) raced on the speed last start and battled on well but found one better over this track and trip. Peaking now third-up and is ready to land the winning blow. SUPER SUNNY SEEYA (5) drifted back over 1100m here last time before winding up late to finish fourth. If they can settle closer from the low draw he will get a great chance to break a long run of outs. BAD TO THE BONE (1) was returning from a break last time out and proved too good, rounding in MY TRUTH on the line. Fitter for that last hitout and this looks well within his grasp, though he does concede weight to many of these. SUMADARTSON (6) comes through that race and looks best placed out of all them from it as he meets the winner 5kgs better with the claim after finishing third. Could easily reverse the result with that swing. WANDERING EYE (7) was okay back in fifth behind them and looks best of the rest.
